project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: Currently running in hole with MFC. Data expected 2-3am

project: PRJ03313 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - T-108 - MFC
comment: Welltec have run their cutter, performed creep tests and are now correlating for the cut. An online meeting was held by TCO to review the correlation and confirm the cut depth and the goahead has been given to proceed. A further MFC24 run will follow the cutting run to confirm the cut depth and evaluate the cut.

project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: Blue Spark run complete. Rig up slickline and perform drift and brush. Before MFC run. Equipment checked last night.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment:
String check tools in prep for HBB-01
Current lookahead MFC run Thursday night

project: PRJ03313 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - T-108 - MFC
comment: Ran MFC survey overnight and Tim confirmed that the RCT cut had been unsuccessful. Back at surface at 08:00hrs KT and currently bleeding down and waiting to flush the lubricator and tool with diesel prior to rigging down the MFC string. TCO arranged a meeting to discuss the report and the next operation is likely to be the Welltec cutter.
